witnesses.description: Exact real-pair addition and multiplication for 1 + 2i and 3 - i.
The product of 3 + 4i with its conjugate is 25 + 0i.
The complex number i is a root of x^2 + 1.

checks.claim: The listed complex sum and product match real-pair complex arithmetic.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes pair addition and twisted multiplication exactly.

checks.claim: The listed conjugate and norm-squared product match the fixed complex number.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes conjugation and z*conjugate(z) exactly.

checks.claim: The listed complex number i is a root of x^2 + 1.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes z^2 and z^2 + 1 as exact real-pair arithmetic.
